messages.content: How do I get a refund?

### Refund Process

**Short Summary**
You can request a refund for software subscriptions or unused physical products within 30 days of purchase by contacting customer support or filing a billing dispute through your account dashboard.

**Step-by-Step Instructions**
1. Determine if your request falls within the **30-day money-back guarantee** window.
2. Log in to your account dashboard.
3. Select the option to **file a billing dispute** or **contact customer support** to submit your request.
4. Once your request is approved, the refund will be processed immediately.

**Important Notes**
* Refunds may take **5 to 7 business days** to appear on your bank or card statement, depending on your financial institution.
* Subscriptions cancelled mid-cycle are **not eligible for partial refunds**, but your service will remain active until the end of the current billing cycle.

**Simple Workflow**
[Start] --> [Request Refund via Dashboard/Support] --> [Approval Process] --> [Processing (Immediate)] --> [Bank Settlement (5-7 days)] --> [End]

Let me know if you need any further assistance.

### Refund Process

**Short Summary**
You can request a refund for software subscriptions or unused physical products within 30 days of purchase by contacting customer support or filing a billing dispute through your account dashboard.

**Step-by-Step Instructions**
1. Determine if your request falls within the **30-day money-back guarantee** window.
2. Log in to your account dashboard to file a **billing dispute**, or contact our customer support team directly.
3. Wait for the approval of your refund request.
4. Once approved, allow **5 to 7 business days** for the funds to reflect on your bank or card statement.

**Important Notes**
* Refunds are eligible for software subscriptions and unused physical products only.
* If you cancel a subscription mid-cycle, you are **not eligible for a partial refund**; however, your access will continue until the end of the current billing cycle.
* Processing times depend on your specific financial institution.

**Simple Workflow**

Once a refund request is approved, the funds are processed immediately; however, the time it takes for the credit to appear depends on your financial institution.

b) Step-by-Step Instructions
1. Contact customer support or file a billing dispute through your account dashboard.
2. Wait for the refund request to be reviewed and approved.
3. Allow 5 to 7 business days for the transaction to appear on your bank or card statement.

c) Important Notes

What happens if a subscription payment fails?

### Subscription Payment Failure Information

If your subscription payment fails, our automatic system will attempt to retry the charge after 3, 7, and 14 days. If the payment fails on the final attempt, your subscription will be paused automatically.

Feel free to ask if you have any other questions.
I want to cancel my premium subscription

### How to Cancel Your Premium Subscription

You can cancel your Premium subscription at any time by accessing your account portal settings.

**Step-by-Step Instructions**
1. Log into your account portal.
2. Navigate to **Settings > Billing**.
3. Click **'Cancel Subscription'**.
4. Follow the prompts until you receive a cancellation confirmation email.

**Important Notes**
* Cancellation halts automatic renewal.
* Your Premium access continues until your current billing term expires.
* There are no cancellation fees.
* If you downgrade, your account defaults back to the Free plan, and your saved workspaces will be locked to read-only mode.

**Cancellation Workflow**
```text
[Log into Account Portal]
          |
          v
  [Settings > Billing]
          |
          v
[Click 'Cancel Subscription']
          |
          v
   [Follow Prompts]
          |
          v
[Receive Confirmation Email]
```

Feel free to ask if you have any other questions.

messages.content: Can I speak to a real person please?

Hello. I completely understand your preference to speak with one of our team members directly, and I would be more than happy to facilitate that for you. 

Your experience and satisfaction are our top priorities. I am going to escalate your request immediately so that a senior support coordinator can personally review your concerns and assist you further. 

I have initiated a support ticket on your behalf to ensure your inquiry is prioritized. A human representative will reach out to you as soon as possible to provide the personalized attention you deserve. 

Is there anything specific you would like me to note in your ticket before I hand this over to my human colleagues?

tickets.title: Customer report of locked account access

messages.content: Your service is complete garbage! I demand to know why my account is locked!

Hello. Thank you for reaching out to us. I can certainly hear how frustrated you are, and I sincerely apologize for the stress and inconvenience this experience has caused you. Please know that your experience is very important to us, and I am here to ensure we resolve this for you.

Regarding your account access, I would recommend a few preliminary steps while I prepare your escalation. Please ensure that your Caps Lock is disabled and verify that you are entering the correct registered email address. Additionally, clearing your browser’s cookies and cache or attempting to log in via an incognito window can often resolve unexpected login errors. If you need to reset your password, you may use the "Forgot Password" link on the login screen, which will send a secure recovery link to your inbox. Please note that for security purposes, this link will expire in 30 minutes.

Because I understand how vital it is to regain access to your account promptly, I have gone ahead and escalated your concern to our senior human support team. They will review your account status as a high priority. I have created a support ticket on your behalf, and a human representative will follow up with you directly to investigate why your account is locked and assist you in regaining access.

Thank you for your patience while we prioritize this for you.

i forgot my password

Hello! I understand how frustrating it can be to lose access to your account, and I would be more than happy to assist you with resetting your password.

Please follow these steps to regain access:

*   **Initiate Reset:** On the login screen, click the **'Forgot Password'** link.
*   **Verify Email:** Enter your registered email address to receive a secure recovery link.
*   **Time Sensitivity:** Please note that for security reasons, this recovery link will **expire in 30 minutes**.
*   **Troubleshooting:** If you do not see the email in your inbox, please check your **spam or promotions folder**. If you continue to experience issues, you may contact our security support team.

Additionally, if you encounter persistent login errors, please ensure your **Caps Lock** is off and verify that you are using the correct registered email address. You may also try clearing your browser's cookies and cache or testing the login in incognito mode.

Please let me know if you need any further assistance!
where is my order?

Hello! I would be more than happy to help you locate your order information.

Once your order has shipped, we send an email to you containing your **tracking number** and a **carrier link** (such as FedEx, UPS, or DHL) so you can monitor its progress.

Regarding our standard delivery timelines:
*   **Standard Shipping:** 3 to 5 business days.
*   **Express Shipping:** 1 to 2 business days.

If your tracking information indicates that the package has been "Delivered" but you are unable to locate it, I recommend the following steps:
*   Check the surrounding areas of your delivery location.
*   Inquire with your neighbors to see if it was left with them.
*   Wait up to 24 hours, as carriers sometimes mark items as delivered prematurely.

If you have completed these steps and your package is still missing, please file a claim with our support team within 7 days of the delivery timestamp.

Please let me know if you have any additional questions!
i want to cancel my subscription

Hello! I would be more than happy to assist you with the process for cancelling your Premium subscription.

You may cancel your subscription at any time by following these steps:

*   **Access Portal:** Log into your account portal.
*   **Navigate:** Go to **Settings > Billing**.
*   **Action:** Click **'Cancel Subscription'**.
*   **Confirmation:** Follow the remaining prompts until you receive a **cancellation confirmation email**.

**Important details regarding your cancellation:**

*   **Access:** Cancellation halts automatic renewal; however, your Premium access will continue until your current billing term expires.
*   **Fees:** There are no cancellation fees.
*   **Downgrade Status:** Should you choose to downgrade, your account will revert to the Free plan, and your saved workspaces will be locked to read-only mode.
*   **Refunds:** Please note that subscriptions cancelled mid-cycle are not eligible for partial refunds. 

If you have any additional questions or need further assistance, please feel free to ask!

tickets.title: Double charge on monthly billing invoice

messages.content: Hello, I checked my bank statement today and I see two charges of $29.99 for my subscription. I only have one account, and the system should only charge me once. Can you check this and refund the extra transaction?

Hi John, I understand your frustration. I am looking into your account billing logs. I see that on July 15, there was a duplicate transaction processed due to a temporary gateway retry. Let me flag this to our billing supervisor to issue an immediate credit.
Okay, thank you. How long will the refund take to get back to my Visa card? I need to make sure this gets resolved as quickly as possible.

tickets.title: Unable to sync Google Calendar with dashboard

messages.content: Hi support team, I upgraded to Premium primarily to sync my schedule, but every time I click 'Sync Google Calendar', the popup closes immediately and shows error code CAL-403. My email is registered.

Hello Alice! I'd be happy to help resolve the calendar sync error. The CAL-403 error usually points to Google Workspace OAuth permissions. Could you verify if your admin has allowed external application integrations, or try disconnecting and re-authorizing the account?

tickets.title: Urgent: Charged after cancelling my subscription

messages.content: This is unacceptable! I cancelled my subscription last month, but I was just charged $199 today! I demand an immediate refund and deletion of my card data. I have already sent a cancel confirmation email earlier, this is illegal!
Just wanted to say the new update is fantastic! The UI is extremely clean and pages load at least twice as fast as before. Hats off to the design team!
Wow John, thank you so much for the wonderful feedback! The team put a lot of effort into optimization and redesign. We are thrilled you love the results!

knowledge.title: Refund Policy and Processing Times
knowledge.content: Our standard refund policy offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on all software subscriptions and unused physical products. To request a refund, please contact customer support or file a billing dispute through your account dashboard. Once approved, refunds are processed immediately but can take 5 to 7 business days to appear on your bank statement or card statement, depending on your financial institution. Subscriptions cancelled mid-cycle are not eligible for partial refunds but will remain active until the end of the current billing cycle.

knowledge.title: How to Cancel Your Premium Subscription
knowledge.content: You can cancel your Premium subscription at any time. Log into your account portal, navigate to Settings > Billing, and click 'Cancel Subscription'. Follow the prompts until you receive a cancellation confirmation email. Note that cancellation halts automatic renewal, but your Premium access continues until your current billing term expires. There are no cancellation fees. If you downgrade, your account defaults back to the Free plan, and your saved workspaces will be locked to read-only mode.

knowledge.title: Tracking Orders and Shipping Speeds
knowledge.content: Once an order is shipped, we send an email containing your tracking number and carrier link (e.g., FedEx, UPS, or DHL). Standard Shipping takes 3 to 5 business days, while Express Shipping takes 1 to 2 business days. If your tracking states 'Delivered' but you cannot find the package: check surrounding areas, inquire with neighbors, and wait up to 24 hours as carriers sometimes mark items as delivered prematurely. If still missing, file a claim with our support within 7 days of the delivery timestamp.

knowledge.title: Technical Support: Resetting Password and Login Errors
knowledge.content: If you encounter login errors, first ensure your Caps Lock is off and you are entering the correct registered email. To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen, enter your email address, and verify your inbox for a secure recovery link. This link expires in 30 minutes for security reasons. If you do not receive the email, search your spam or promotions folder, or contact security support. Common browser issues can be solved by clearing cookies and cache or testing in incognito mode.

knowledge.title: Billing Cycle, Invoices, and Payment Options
knowledge.content: Subscriptions are billed on a recurring basis, either monthly or annually, starting from the exact date you upgrade. Invoices are automatically generated and emailed to you at the start of each cycle. We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, and Google Pay. Card details can be updated securely in your billing panel. If a payment fails, our automatic system retries the charge after 3, 7, and 14 days. If payment fails on the final attempt, your subscription will be paused automatically.
